title: AI Agent node connection timeout due to proxy settings
symptom: The AI Agent node throws a 'connection timed out' error when trying to connect through a proxy, despite environment variables being set.
applies_when: Proxy settings are configured in environment variables
not_this_if: Proxy settings are correctly configured in the node settings
Using a different node type that supports proxy configuration
root_cause: The AI Agent node relies on global environment variables for proxy settings, unlike standard HTTP nodes that allow per-node proxy configuration. If these variables are not set in the environment that starts n8n, the connection will fail.
fix_steps: Ensure HTTP_PROXY and HTTPS_PROXY are set in the environment that starts n8n (e.g., .env file or Docker environment)
For HTTP Request nodes, configure the Proxy option directly in the node settings to override global settings.
agent_instruction: Set the proxy environment variables in the correct context and configure the Proxy option in HTTP Request nodes if used.
